title: GeegaMon
description: Ever wanted to adventure through the world of Cobblemon with Geega by your side? This addon brings the beloved VTuber Geega straight into your Minecraft world as a Cobblemon companion!
body:
# Geega Addon for Cobblemon

Ever wanted to adventure through the world of Cobblemon with Geega by your side? This addon brings the beloved VTuber **Geega** straight into your Minecraft world as a Cobblemon companion!

### ✨ Features

* Adds **Geega** as a unique, catchable Cobblemon.
* Fully modeled and textured to match her iconic look.
* Custom cries, animations, and behaviors inspired by her VTuber personality.
* Compatible with the latest version of Cobblemon.

### 🕹️ How to Use

1. Install **Cobblemon** first (required).
2. Drop this addon into your `mods` or `resourcepacks` folder (depending on setup).
3. Load up your world and find Geega in the wild — ready to be caught and trained!

### 📦 Requirements

* **Minecraft** (Fabric/Quilt)
* **Cobblemon**

### 💡 Notes

This is a **fan-made addon** and not officially affiliated with Geega or Cobblemon. Just made for fun to bring more personality into your Cobblemon adventures!
